entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC

[xule.buildIndexTime] Index build time 0:00:00.037316. - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\SINT_instance_2024_2025.xml
[xule.ruleDebug] Processing: DQC.US.0194.10636 - 11:33:53.119567 - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\SINT_instance_2024_2025.xml

[xule.ruleDebug] D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\SINT_instance_2024_2025.xml - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\SINT_instance_2024_2025.xml

[DQC.US.0194.10636] us-gaap:StockRedeemedOrCalledDuringPeriodShares has a value of -1 which is less than zero. This element should not have a negative value when used with the preferred stock [Member]. The preparer should consider if the value is input correctly for this assertion and, after considering the appropriateness of the input, if incorrect, input the amount as a positive (i.e., absolute) value and provide a negated label.
The properties of this us-gaap:StockRedeemedOrCalledDuringPeriodShares fact are: Period :2023-01-01 to 2023-12-31 Dimensions : us-gaap:StatementEquityComponentsAxis=us-gaap:PreferredStockMember Unit : shares Rule Element Id:10636 Rule version: 29.0.2 - SINT_instance_2024_2025.xml 1974

[DQC.US.0194.10636] us-gaap:StockRedeemedOrCalledDuringPeriodShares has a value of -7 which is less than zero. This element should not have a negative value when used with the preferred stock [Member]. The preparer should consider if the value is input correctly for this assertion and, after considering the appropriateness of the input, if incorrect, input the amount as a positive (i.e., absolute) value and provide a negated label.
The properties of this us-gaap:StockRedeemedOrCalledDuringPeriodShares fact are: Period :2024-01-01 to 2024-12-31 Dimensions : us-gaap:StatementEquityComponentsAxis=us-gaap:PreferredStockMember Unit : shares Rule Element Id:10636 Rule version: 29.0.2 - SINT_instance_2024_2025.xml 6215
